MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD'S MOTION TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Audrey G. Williams, 756-8617 deft in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. In addition, the Court indicated that defendant to file a responsive pleading within 15 days. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216
